Default is hold across the watchlist: the moves are capital-structure/sentiment driven (bond sale, positioning) rather than fresh fundamental breaks, and there is no falsifiable buy catalyst in today's snapshots. NOTE: prior dated signals run was 2026-06-12 (the 06-12 JNJ buy was approved but never filled - executions row 1 'refused_stale'), so today opens flat.
